title: Junior Business Development Manager at Panchshil Realty

jsonLd.title: Junior Business Development Manager at Panchshil Realty
jsonLd.description:
Panchshil Realty has an exciting opening for a Business Development Manager at our Ranchi office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About Panchshil Realty:
Panchshil Realty is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Conduct land acquisition due diligence and feasibility studies
• Manage RERA documentation and compliance requirements
• Manage relationships with existing customers post-purchase
• Coordinate with legal teams for documentation and title verification
• Maintain a pipeline of qualified leads using CRM software
• Conduct site visits and property presentations for clients
• Provide advisory services on property investment and market trends

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in RERA Compliance
• Proficiency in Contract Management
• Proficiency in Market Research
• Proficiency in Property Management
• Proficiency in Portfolio Management
• Proficiency in AutoCAD
• Proficiency in Negotiation Skills
• Proficiency in Real Estate Law

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Annual performance appraisal
• Professional development and training programs
• Maternity and paternity leave
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Ranchi, Jharkhand, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Panchshil Realty!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
